reviews.review_description: I got this year's ago on gear vr. Can't I download it on  meta quest 3s
The details of the animals are amazing. It’s a little hard to navigate but as someone who goes shark diving this is a great little escape to the underwater world. Highly recommend.
I love this app!  BUT I cant find the whales and one of the ancient critters, the pilosaurus. I have Occulous GO!   What am AI doing wrong?
Everything about this is the tops. Really glad I have this to show how great the GO is to others

I was reluctant to buy this app, after some of the reviews. But I am delighted that I bought it, downloaded and installed seamlessly. An absolute delight to experience on the Oculus Go!
Graphics amazing, the whole under water experience incredible!
Can't wait to show potential VR users this amazing experience.
My kids loved this.  I thought it was pretty cool too.

The graphics are super nice.  Very well done.  2 stars because it is too pricey.  I paid got it on daily deal and still think it was overpriced.   

A bit of treasure hunting.  Like putting 25 keys that you can find would make it more interesting. 

My 11 years old played like 10 minutes max and got bored.  And scared too (see below)

But the biggest down is the fact that you can actually get attack by a great shark.  You swim and relax and then a big shark surprises you.  VERY BAD.  A safe mode.  An option to shark not attack would be Necessary.  Specially that great shark rarely attack human.

Ever been in the ocean under water with the wildlife?  This one will get you there with very little effort, and you are THERE!  Take the swim without getting wet and BE the diver without the challenge of filling the air cylinders before you go!

I recently purchased an OCULAS Go.
This was one of the Apps I downloaded and found it very relaxing.
Worth the money. 👍

Makes you feel like you are there. Kinda relaxing with the turtles, kinda terrifying with the deeper water but that’s mostly on my end. Dark water is creepy to me in real life. Got to see the humpbacks and once the blue whale but having trouble finding him the second time. I’m still trying to get over being chicken to find the giant octopus. Overall I do wish you could tone down the bubbles to better hear the animals.
We cannot find the Mosasaur or Octopus....do u have to do something to find them?
So peaceful and relaxing. Love all the different options of animals. Great for all ages, although, the controls do take a little getting used to.
I love this experience. Totally worth the money. Great job. I want more content like this, maybe one with land animals next time.
Love this ... Great for grandkids.. Excellently graphics... Easy to use...
It's fun buy it

I love this app. I also enjoy snorkeling and find it simulates that experience without having to surface for air. Very relaxing and so realistic I would definitely purchase if you like the feeling of floating in the ocean
It is very popular app. I am  surprised why we can't install it on sdcard? We should be able to see sea surface also.

reviews.review_title: Have the ability you did not have!
reviews.review_description: I have cancer (it’s not like a really bad one I will survive) so I can’t do sports and stuff and that’s why I got VR you can do whatever and here I can swim! It is amazing since I don’t see animals like this a lot

Superb 3D models of the environment and the creatures within it make this a must have experience for the GO.

Most of the environments are reasonably large and rewarding to explore.The models of the fish and mammals featured in the game are superb and their animation is well done. A couple of my family who have tried it even mistook them for the real thing (its that good).

If the game has a flaw its a minor one and that is that the only way to turn around is to physically do so. As you are blind when you have a go headset on and my living room is pretty cluttered this is not a good move. Allowing you to turn around with the touch-pad would be a big improvement.

A lot of content seems to be missing whales.
  can be heard but not seen? Having now reviewed this had I realised how much does not work I would have requested refund.
